title: In re Decaria Consultants Ltd [2022] NUHC 7; CV2022-00060 (3 June 2022)
text:
In re Decaria Consultants Ltd [2022] NUHC 7; CV2022-00060 (3 June 2022)
IN THE HIGH COURT OF NIUE
(CIVIL DIVISION)
Application: CV2022-00060
UNDER
The Companies Act 2006
IN THE MATTER
Decaria Consultants Limited
AND
MRS JANA OMANIKOVA
Applicant
Date:
3 June 2022 (NZT)
JUDGMENT OF C T COXHEAD CJ
Application for re-registration and restoration
[1]	This is an application for re-registration and restoration of Decaria Consultants Limited to the Niue Companies Register.
[2]	Decaria Consultants Limited was incorporated as an International Business Company under number 07299 on the 11
th
day of January 2001 (“the Company”).
[3]	The Company’s director was Mr Chrispin Bellot and who by power of attorney appointed Mr Štefan Omanik as its agent.
[4]	Mr Bellot relied on Mr Omanik to manage the day to day operations of the Company including maintenance of its registration in
Niue among other things. Mr Bellot resigned as a director and is not available.
[5]	The Company has 2 shares. Those shares are held by the applicant.
[6]	I have read the affidavit of Jana Omanikova in support of the application.
Orders
[7]	I am satisfied that orders can be made. I therefore order:
(a)	Restoration of the Company to the Companies Register under s 276 of the Companies Act 2006 with the Memorandum and Articles of
Association under which the Company was incorporated as an International Business Company, number 07299 pursuant to s 332 of the
Companies Act 2006.
(b)	The Company is registered as a private company.
(c)	Mrs Jana Omanikova of Slušovice, Slunečná Street 313, ZIP code 76315, Czech Republic, Retired is to be registered
as the sole shareholder of the Company.
(d)	Mrs Jana Omanikova of Slušovice, Slunečná Street 313, ZIP code 76315, Czech Republic, Retired is appointed as
a director of the Company.
(e)	Mr Chrispin Bellot is removed as a director of the Company.
[8]	The above orders are made conditional on confirmation to me that all relevant fees have been paid.
[9]	I also note that:
(a)	The registered office and postal address of the Company to be care of its Niue representative: Hekau Attorneys at Law Attn: 
Kahealani Hekau, House 5, Fakaleaina, Alofi South, Niue Island 9974.
(b)	The records required by s 117 to be kept at the registered office of the Company and care of the applicant at: Mrs Jana Omanikova
of Slušovice Slunečná Street 313, ZIP code 76315, Czech Republic.
Dated at Rotorua, Aotearoa/New Zealand this 3
rd
day of June 2022.
C T Coxhead
CHIEF JUSTICE
PacLII:
Copyright Policy
|
